hello: Hi! How can I help you today?
how are you: I am doing great. Thanks for asking!
what is your name: I am an AI Chatbot built using Python and Flask.
who created you: I was created as part of a chatbot project.
what is machine learning: Machine Learning is a branch of AI that allows systems to learn from data.
what is artificial intelligence: Artificial Intelligence enables machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence.
what is python: Python is a popular programming language known for its simplicity.
what is flask: Flask is a lightweight Python web framework used for building web applications.
what is html: HTML is used to create the structure of web pages.
what is css: CSS is used to style and design web pages.
what is javascript: JavaScript adds interactivity to web pages.
tell me a joke: Why do programmers prefer dark mode? Because light attracts bugs!

good evening: Good evening! How can I assist you?
